Title: Verify Forms Based Authentication Welcome Screen Components

Step Action: Launch application with forms based authentication enabled

Welcome screen is visible with username field
Password field is displayed on welcome screen
Sign-in Log-in button is displayed on welcome screen

'Sign in with Microsoft' button is displayed on welcome screen
Message 'Please ensure you have cleared all devices of previous patient data.' is displayed
'Is this an Emergency?' button is displayed on welcome screen
Copyright text is displayed at the bottom of welcome screen
Welcome screen is displayed

Step Expected: Username is accepted in the username field

Step Action: Enter valid password in password field

Error message closes

'Forgot your password?' button is visible and clickable
'Forgot your password?' button responds to click action
Application navigates to forgot/change password screen
